parameters.query: INSERT INTO pokemon (pokemon_id, name, height, weight, base_xp) VALUES ({{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.pokemon_id }}, '{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.name }}', {{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.height }}, {{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.weight }}, {{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.base_xp }}) ON CONFLICT (pokemon_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, height = EXCLUDED.height, weight = EXCLUDED.weight, base_xp = EXCLUDED.base_xp;

INSERT INTO pokemon_files (pokemon_id, bucket_name, object_key, file_name, file_type, mime_type, internal_url) VALUES ({{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.pokemon_id }}, 'raw-pokemon', '{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_raw }}', 'raw.json', 'raw_json', 'application/json', 'http://minio:9000/raw-pokemon/{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_raw }}'), ({{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.pokemon_id }}, 'pokemon-images', '{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_img }}', 'official-artwork.png', 'image', 'image/png', 'http://minio:9000/pokemon-images/{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_img }}') ON CONFLICT (bucket_name, object_key) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO file_ingestion_log (file_name, bucket_name, object_key, source, status, message) VALUES ('raw.json', 'raw-pokemon', '{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_raw }}', 'pokeapi', 'SUCCESS', 'Ingestion via workflow n8n'), ('official-artwork.png', 'pokemon-images', '{{ $('Preparer metadonnees').item.json.object_key_img }}', 'pokeapi', 'SUCCESS', 'Ingestion via workflow n8n');
